textByHash.2fa975678e10c97097916de7232bfab82f2e8918: My lord... We've finished our latest round of tithing. I'm afraid we haven't been able to collect the desired amount.
textByHash.1314b41b5e7a1a4dfd8694031d49838895a4f333: My lord Vanstrom, there are precious few human settlements left worth collecting tithes from.
textByHash.d993ec28bf0339bea0124ec1a3402a6b3a4f1f5e: Mort'ton is just a dead town, full of afflicted. Lord Malak was so ill when he drank of them last time.
textByHash.0fdfd5a7dd4564c239be4024ab32079d160adf0a: Canifis is delivering more than expected but that still isn't sufficient.
textByHash.75a40d8b37be642b6ac28a91c6e4d0c3b81938d8: Please, where should I get the remainder from?
textByHash.776f33cb2c163258fc3838c809db1d3e0d46bb13: But Burgh de Rott is abandoned.
textByHash.aae640de5e5aa88585bc75e1d83c56e4ff7345d8: Oh happy days! It's so good we found all these specimens here! If it hadn't been for some good soul lighting that furnace, we'd have never come down here!
textByHash.ba5046a97fb8bf1f696f84179abc364b08bfa6d8: Now I should be able to make my blood tithe quota... especially after you pay your tithe. You look like an incredibly fit specimen!
textByHash.9aefdea2b269a5fd6adf6b9b357f0de9121439df: I bet you could pay twice as much as the others before passing out!
textByHash.b780c1fc97b26231204f0105f890fa2fb6ce5c2f: I've had enough of you poking your nose in here! If you think you can stop us, go ahead!
textByHash.9e9d1c56b15f1ee0d75559584a782632d1327464: But... you don't understand. I just didn't want my family... I wanted to keep them safe.
textByHash.1c29c9edc7a142d3466ecf220ae8d6b8b13b2777: Then... will you do me a favour? Please, try to save them. Please! I beg you!
textByHash.4a4a6e2535dbeb8e9a49a636a36df6139574c842: Thank you. I have some information which may help you...
textByHash.9ff0aecf86d1a1c48339cc2d3bc5aa0a5a702e6b: They fear some things. Silver dust and garlic to name a couple. Also outlawed are [cough] -ralander and [cough] -ders eggs. The potion which you make with them is also forbidden.
textByHash.a12d9fcf3587694758db96107e8a245eb3bbeace: It's too late for me [cough]. Though with what I've told you [cough], perhaps you can find a way to [cough] bring light to Morytania.
